title: Hazelnut Crostini with Spinach Florentine
description: A quick and easy appetizer or snack that combines the flavors of hazelnuts and spinach. Perfect for a light meal or as a starter.
instructions: Arrange crostini slices on a baking sheet.
Drizzle olive oil over crostini and sprinkle with minced garlic.
Bake for 5-7 minutes or until lightly toasted.
Meanwhile, combine chopped hazelnuts and crumbled Florentine cheese in a bowl.
Add fresh spinach to the bowl and toss to combine.
Once crostini are toasted, let cool for 1 minute.
Top each crostini with a spoonful of the hazelnut and spinach mixture.
